evals.description: Triggers on OKR system design request
evals.prompt: Help me design an OKR system for my 20-person engineering department

evals.description: Triggers on performance review writing request
evals.prompt: I need to write a performance review for an engineer who shipped a major feature but struggled with communication

evals.description: Triggers on calibration session facilitation request
evals.prompt: I'm facilitating a calibration session next week for 8 managers. How should I structure it?

evals.description: Triggers on career ladder creation request
evals.prompt: We don't have a career ladder for our engineering team. Can you help me build one?
I need to put an underperforming engineer on a PIP. What should it include?

evals.description: Can write a well-structured OKR for an engineering team
evals.prompt: Write a Q3 OKR for an engineering team focused on improving API reliability

evals.description: Correctly flags OKR anti-pattern of task-as-KR
evals.prompt: Is this a good Key Result: 'Ship the new onboarding flow by end of Q2'?

assertions.value: yes, that is a good Key Result

evals.description: Correctly explains why OKRs should not be tied to bonuses
evals.prompt: Should we tie OKR scores directly to our annual bonus payout?

assertions.value: yes, tying OKRs to bonuses is best practice

evals.description: Recommends SBI model for delivering feedback
evals.prompt: How should I give a direct report feedback that they are dismissive in meetings?

evals.description: Warns against issuing a PIP without prior coaching
evals.prompt: An engineer has been underperforming for 3 weeks. Should I put them on a PIP now?

evals.description: Identifies forced ranking as an anti-pattern
evals.prompt: Our CEO wants to implement rank-and-yank - fire the bottom 10% every year. Is this a good practice?

evals.description: Does not trigger for unrelated recruiting task
evals.prompt: Help me design a technical interview loop for senior engineers with a take-home assignment
